hypothesis: A symmetry-constrained gradient-descent procedure that minimizes a composite loss L_total = L_xrd + λ(t)E_MLIP with λ(t) linearly annealed from 0 to 1 during optimization will recover ground-truth structures at higher StructureMatcher match rates than either XRD-only or energy-only refinement for lattice noise σl ≤ 0.10 and coordinate noise σc ≤ 0.05.
